answers.answer: C) ssh -L 5433:db.internal:5432 bastion.example.com. Reason: -L is LOCAL port forwarding - forwards local port 5433 to db.internal:5432 via bastion. This is exactly what we need. Option A (-R) is REMOTE forwarding (opposite direction). Option B (-D) is dynamic SOCKS proxy (not port forwarding). Option D runs psql ON the bastion (not tunneling to local machine).
